allow: Bash(nano-banana "Photorealistic MacBook Pro laptop mockup, 3/4 angle view from the left side, screen tilted open about 110 degrees. Screen displays a modern dark-themed website with black background, a glowing pink gradient headline text, violet/purple UI card elements, clean minimal navigation bar, and a bright pink CTA button. Laptop body is space gray brushed aluminum with sharp edges. Dramatic rim lighting with pink \(#ff2d8f\) glow on the left edge and violet \(#8b5cf6\) glow on the right edge. Pure black background. Ultra-sharp 3D render, cinematic studio lighting, photorealistic materials, detailed keyboard, trackpad visible on base. No watermarks, no text overlays." --model pro -s 2K -a 16:9 -o laptop-hero -d "c:/Users/user/meine-website/SP Studio V1/public" --costs)

Bash(nano-banana "Photorealistic MacBook Pro laptop mockup, 3/4 angle view from the left side, screen tilted open about 110 degrees. Screen displays a modern dark-themed website with black background, a glowing pink gradient headline text, violet/purple UI card elements, clean minimal navigation bar, and a bright pink CTA button. Laptop body is space gray brushed aluminum with sharp edges. Dramatic rim lighting with pink \(#ff2d8f\) glow on the left edge and violet \(#8b5cf6\) glow on the right edge. Isolated on bright solid green screen background. Ultra-sharp 3D render, cinematic studio lighting, photorealistic materials, detailed keyboard, trackpad visible on base. No watermarks, no text overlays." --model pro -s 2K -a 16:9 -o laptop-hero-transparent -d "c:/Users/user/meine-website/SP Studio V1/public" -t --costs)
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='src/components/sections/hero.tsx'; const c=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); fs.writeFileSync\(p,c\);")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove hardcoded Windows path from next.config.ts *)
